description: DomoDucks is a parent-child-provenance collection of 256 clickable/interactive domo-inspired ducks on Block 9 sats with a verifiably fixed supply that's descended from Inscription #256—the first duck inscribed on Bitcoin. We were also the first Ordinals community to implement on-chain breeding via multi-parent-child provenance, and the initial 42 offspring were appended to the collection to cap the total supply at 300 (i.e., Inscription #256 + Logo + 256 DomoDucks + 42 Offspring = 300).
name: DomoDucks
